growth_records.strain: MAG-based population (n=2 MAGs), not axenic culture
growth_records.medium: Freshwater reservoir water column (epilimnion), Římov Reservoir, Czech Republic
growth_records.cite: Kavagutti et al. High-resolution metagenomic reconstruction of the freshwater spring bloom. Microbiome (2023). DOI:10.1186/s40168-022-01451-4. [PMC9878933]
growth_records.snippet: Ca. Methylopumilus (2) 134.74 ± 63.17 [CARD-FISH, Observed in situ, h]
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (134.74 ± 63.17 h) is the CARD-FISH 'Observed, in situ' value from Table 1. growth_rate_per_h = ln2/134.74 = 0.0051 h-1. Alternative metagenomic-based observed value (61.66 h), mortality-corrected estimates (70.39 h CARD-FISH; 34 h metagenomic), and gRodon estimate (22.98 h) also reported but not used here. Only n=2 MAGs -- small sample. [metadata completed from paper Methods: temperature]
